release_notes: After the left-right jump was fixed, the all-brands matrix started snapping to the **top** on each operation. Cause was a regression in the previous fix: the scroll-restore gave up after ~0.75 s, but a large all-brands page's scroll range keeps growing past that, so the saved position was never reached. The restore now keeps re-applying as the page settles (up to a few seconds, and only while the content size is still changing — it never fights your own scrolling), so both axes stay put.
